column2: Only 2 verifiable POIs uploaded (Santuario de S. Jose de Calumbo, Kwanza Riverbank via places-photo ref); Places otherwise returns only transient bars/restaurants and wrong-place workshop photos for mercado/praca queries; text-only riverfront generations repeatedly rendered Luanda landmarks (wrong place)

Only 3 verifiable POIs uploaded (Catedral, Praca Central/Mandume statue, Governo Provincial); market photos are stall close-ups/selfies, Shoprite and Mediateca generations repeatedly invented different buildings (wrong place), no other distinct walkable landmark in Places
